title: TSA Frontiers
description: Our latest modpack focused on grand terrain generation along with beautiful shaders, exploring wild new lands with a mix of old and new tech. Created for our private server and community.
body:
**Please note this modpack is intended for playing on our private server and in our community.**

Our latest modpack focused on grand terrain generation along with beautiful shaders, exploring wild new lands with a mix of old and new tech.

# Features
- **Vast uncharted landscapes** - Discover the new unique terrain on the frontiers, collosal mountains, vast deserts, steep mesa, volcanoes, and hundreds of new biomes (Terralith, Tectonic) 
- **Wild creatures** - Find new wildlife and mythical creatures scattered around, including the return of dragons! (Ice and Fire, Critters and Companions, Wilder Nature)
- **Immersive atmosphere** - Lose yourself in beautifully shaded landscapes that stretch as far as the eye can see, hearing new sounds, and finding something new in everything. (Distant Horizons, Ambient Sounds, Complementary Shaders, Euphoria Patches, Fresh Animations, Sounds)
- **Different dimensions** - Stumble upon a newly overhauled nether and end, different than before with so much more to see. (Incendium, Nullscape)
- **Dungeons, ruins, and outposts** - Let the occasional lighthouse guide you to land, then bring others to take on the gigantic new dungeons with dark souls style bosses (L_Enders Cataclysm, YUNGs, Towns and Towers)
- **Tech, cooking, and magic returns** - All the favorites return, Create, Ars Nouveau, and are back, but this time joined by Mekanism again.

# Credits
It goes without saying that this modpack wouldn't be possible without the amazing work of the modders who created all for the mods we're using, both old ones we've used for years (Create, Mekanism), new ones we've only just started with (Terralith, Tectonic), beautiful shaders (Complementary Shaders, Euphoria Patches), and many others.
